titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the United States Deputy Representative on the North Atlantic Council ( (Spofford), ), at London

div.head: The Secretary of State to the United States Deputy Representative on the North Atlantic Council ( Spofford ), at London
div.p: Todep 30. For Spofford from Perkins. 1. Consensus opinion too dangerous seek incorporation in appropriations legislation itself as suggested Depto 36. Considering possibility inclusion approp statements in either of both House and Senate Comite reports but believe this also dangerous.

2. Clear record these points being made thru Presidential msg, statements key witnesses before comites and at every other point in testimony which will be published. Will make particular effort stress these points in course Senate presentation. In addition will endeavor include clear and unequivocal statement this sub] in Presidential statement at time signature.

3. This general connection call attn to so called Ellender amendment incorporated this year’s MDAP legis which requires President terminate all or any part of any assis authorized if he determines, after consultation with NAT Council, such nation is not making its full contribution thru self-help and mutual assis in all practicable forms to common defense NA area. [Perkins.]
